title: Create a Rockstar Games Account
headline: Create a Rockstar Games Account
subtitle: Get a GTA$500,000 Bonus and Much More
content:
A Rockstar Games account gets you access to many GTA Online benefits. Personalize your rides with the License Plate Creator and earn rewards for Career Progress.

Link your game account and verify your email to get GTA$500K, an Annis Elegy RH8 (Sports), and a Sawed-Off Shotgun.

Visit Legendary Motorsport after linking your account to claim your Elegy RH8, and go to Ammu-Nation to claim your Sawed-Off Shotgun. GTA$500K Reward will be delivered within 72 hours of redeeming. Limit one per account.
